auto_push.description: Fleet-wide kill switch for auto-push. Both this AND project_overrides.<slug>.auto_push (or projects_in_rotation[].auto_push) must be true for any push to fire. Path firewall lives in auto_push_protected_globs + per-project auto_push_allowlist.

auto_pr.description: Deprecated. Draft PR creation is implicit on successful auto-push. Kept for backward-compat; ignored by dispatch.mjs Phase 5b.

auto_push_protected_globs.description: Global never-push patterns. Always win over project allowlists. Module also embeds a hardcoded fallback list (defense-in-depth: a config typo cannot disable protection).

overseer.description: Pillar 1 steps 3+4 -- gates 5+6 of the seven-gate stack. Step 3 (gate 5): read-only Overseer polls draft PRs labeled dispatcher:auto, runs cross-family semantic review (C-1), and labels overseer:approved|rejected|abstain. Step 4 (gate 6): when auto_merge is opted in (top-level + per-repo), after cooling_off_minutes elapse the bot flips the PR ready and merges via REST PUT, writing a pending-merge entry to the status gist for gate 7 to replay. Hosting-independent (GitHub Actions cron). See docs/OVERSEER.md and docs/AUTO-MERGE.md.

enabled.description: Kill switch. Default false (the workflow runs every 2h but exits as a no-op until set true in local.json).

auto_merge.description: Per-repo opt-in for gate 6 (cooling-off + ready-flip + merge). Defaults false. BOTH this AND top-level auto_merge must be true for the bot to merge.

merge_strategy.description: Merge method for gate 6. Default squash. Only squash is fully exercised in v1; rebase/merge are accepted by the schema but the Overseer simply forwards the value to GitHub's PUT /pulls/{n}/merge endpoint.

project_slug.description: Maps owner/repo to the dispatcher's project slug (one of projects_in_rotation[].slug). Required for gate 7 -- the dispatcher needs project_slug to look up the local project path for the canary replay and to flip auto_push:false on auto-suspend.

repos.description: Repos to poll. Strings are legacy and treated as auto_merge:false. Object form carries the per-repo auto_merge / merge_strategy / project_slug needed for gate 6+7.

review_model.description: Default review model when family detection succeeds. Cross-family selection (Gemini-gen -> Mistral, Mistral-gen -> Gemini) overrides this per PR.

max_diff_chars.description: Diff truncation threshold passed to the audit prompt. Default 50000.

abstain_below_confidence.description: Reserved for a future tightening: force abstain when the audit model's reported confidence is below this floor.

auto_merge.description: Pillar 1 step 4 -- gate 6 fleet kill switch. BOTH this AND per-repo overseer.repos[].auto_merge must be true for the Overseer to merge. Default false (mechanism stays dormant).

cooling_off_minutes.description: Gate 6 wait between overseer:approved and the bot's ready-flip. Cron tick after this elapses the bot proceeds. Any human comment / draft-state-change / fresh push during this window blocks the merge. Default 45.

cooling_off_minutes_after_ready.description: Gate 6 wait between the bot's ready-flip and the merge call. Default 0 -- merge happens in the same cron tick as ready-flip when the after-window is zero.

post_merge_canary_replay_schedule_min.description: Gate 7 replay schedule in MINUTES from the merge time. Default [15, 60, 240, 1440] (T+15m, T+1h, T+4h, T+24h). Translated to ms by the Overseer when writing the pending-merges gist entry.

auto_push.description: Per-project auto-push opt-in. Defaults to false. Both this AND top-level auto_push must be true to push. Empty auto_push_allowlist also blocks (defensive default).

auto_push_allowlist.description: Glob patterns whose matching paths are eligible for auto-push. Empty array blocks all pushes regardless of auto_push value (footgun guard). Patterns ANDed with global auto_push_protected_globs which always wins.

canary_command.description: Gate 4 (canary success). Argv-form command (e.g. ["npm.cmd", "run", "canary"]). Runs in the worktree between path-firewall pass and git push. Non-zero exit, timeout, or spawn-error blocks the push and preserves the local commit. Required when auto_push is true: missing canary_command on an opted-in project blocks the push (footgun guard). Array form is mandatory: spawn runs with shell:false to close the config-injection vector. Windows: spawn(shell:false) does not auto-resolve npm to npm.cmd, so use the .cmd extension explicitly or an absolute path.

canary_timeout_ms.description: Hard timeout for canary_command in milliseconds. Default 120000 (2 min) when absent. On timeout, the process tree is killed via taskkill /T /F (Windows) or SIGKILL on the process group (POSIX) and the push is blocked with reason='canary-failed', failure_mode='timeout'.
